violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
Cold water was not available at the handwashing sink. Handwashing sink is in poor repair (cold water knob missing). Handwashing sink must be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Ketchup packets were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Single-service articles (cups, containers, spoons) were observed on the floor. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Cold water was not available at the handwashing sink. Handwashing sink is in poor repair (cold water knob missing). Handwashing sink must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
